PersuasionDevice.name: ITEM_PERSUASIONDEVICE_NAME
PersuasionDevice.desc_resolved:
Side Quest Item. Use to permanently charm a non-boss enemy. It joins your party.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

PersuasionDevice_Fixed.desc_resolved:
Use to permanently charm a non-boss enemy. It joins your party.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

ChaosDevice.name: ARMOR_CHAOSDEVICE_NAME
ChaosDevice.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. When any cat levels up they are offered abilities from all classes.

ChaosDevice_Fixed.name: ARMOR_CHAOSDEVICE_FIXED_NAME
ChaosDevice_Fixed.desc_resolved: Abilities from all classes are offered when you level up. You can reroll your levelup options thrice.

MagicMirror.name: ARMOR_MAGICMIRROR_NAME
MagicMirror.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. Your team has very bad luck during events. +2 Thorns.

MagicMirror_Fixed.name: ARMOR_MAGICMIRROR_FIXED_NAME
MagicMirror_Fixed.desc_resolved: +20% chance to reflect projectiles. Spawn a friendly Spookie when downed.

MeStone.name: ITEM_MESTONE_NAME
MeStone.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. This cat always levels up, and can level up even if it was downed.

MeStone_Fixed.name: ITEM_MESTONE_FIXED_NAME
MeStone_Fixed.desc_resolved: At the end of your turn, drain up to 5 mana from each of your allies.

AngryFace.name: ARMOR_ANGRYFACE_NAME
AngryFace.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. Equipped cat is an enemy, must be downed to win the battle, and can still receive level ups. Can't be equipped to a Collarless cat.

AngryFace_Fixed.name: ARMOR_ANGRYFACE_FIXED_NAME
AngryFace_Fixed.desc_resolved: Spawn near enemies and take an AI controlled bonus turn at the start of every battle.

FartFace.name: ARMOR_FARTFACE_NAME
FartFace.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. Apply Poison 1 to everything at the start of the battle.

FartFace_Fixed.name: ARMOR_FARTFACE_FIXED_NAME
FartFace_Fixed.desc_resolved: Apply Poison 1 to all enemies at the start of the battle.

SpiderInjector.name: ARMOR_SPIDERINJECTOR_NAME
SpiderInjector.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. Apply Infested 4 to all allies at the start of each battle.

SpiderInjector_Fixed.name: ARMOR_SPIDERINJECTOR_FIXED_NAME
SpiderInjector_Fixed.desc_resolved: Apply Infested 1 to all enemies at the start of each battle.

PartyDetonator.name: ITEM_PARTYDETONATOR_NAME
PartyDetonator.desc_resolved:
Side Quest Item. All units explode when they die.
Use: Explode a random other unit, once per battle.

PartyDetonator_Fixed.name: ITEM_PARTYDETONATOR_FIXED_NAME
PartyDetonator_Fixed.desc_resolved:
Use: Explode a random unit within a target radius.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

AirHorn.name: ITEM_AIRHORN_NAME
AirHorn.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. You are Ambushed every battle. Use to make some noise!

AirHorn_Fixed.name: ITEM_AIRHORN_FIXED_NAME
AirHorn_Fixed.desc_resolved:
Use: Apply Madness to a unit within 5 tiles in your line of sight.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

TheLoner.name: ITEM_THELONER_NAME
TheLoner.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. Kill all of your allies at the start of each battle.

TheLoner_Fixed.name: ITEM_THELONER_FIXED_NAME
TheLoner_Fixed.desc_resolved:
Use: Deals 5 damage to anything in your line of sight.
RELOAD: Any ally dies.

GlassCannon.name: ITEM_GLASSCANNON_NAME
GlassCannon.desc_resolved:
Side Quest Item. Fill the map with glass at the start of each battle.
Use: Shoot a glass ball.

GlassCannon_Fixed.name: ITEM_GLASSCANNON_FIXED_NAME
GlassCannon_Fixed.desc_resolved: Use: Shoot a glass ball anywhere.

PrincessHat.name: ARMOR_PRINCESSHAT_NAME
PrincessHat.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. Fragile. Equipped cat cannot use any actions except Move.

HardPill.name: ITEM_HARDPILL_NAME
HardPill.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. The adventure is harder!

HardPill_Fixed.name: ITEM_HARDPILL_FIXED_NAME
HardPill_Fixed.desc_resolved: +3 Brace. You count as a rock.

BubbleBoy.name: ARMOR_BUBBLEBOY_NAME
BubbleBoy.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. All units rebound with Knockback 5 on contact.

BubbleBoy_Fixed.name: ITEM_BUBBLEBOY_FIXED_NAME
BubbleBoy_Fixed.desc_resolved: Use: Throw a bubble with Wind and Water Element that inflicts Confusion.

Redacted.name: ARMOR_REDACTED_NAME
Redacted.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. Health bars and status icons are hidden in battle.

Redacted_Fixed.name: ARMOR_REDACTED_FIXED_NAME
Redacted_Fixed.desc_resolved: Your [img:cha] is equal to your highest other stat.

Stopwatch.name: ITEM_STOPWATCH_NAME
Stopwatch.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. You have 5 seconds to make decisions in battle, otherwise cats will act randomly.

Stopwatch_Fixed.name: ITEM_STOPWATCH_FIXED_NAME
Stopwatch_Fixed.desc_resolved:
Use: You or a target unit takes an AI controlled bonus turn.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

StorageLocker.name: ARMOR_STORAGELOCKER_NAME
StorageLocker.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. Your team's active ability level ups offer rare items instead.

StorageLocker_Fixed.name: ARMOR_STORAGELOCKER_FIXED_NAME
StorageLocker_Fixed.desc_resolved: Find an extra item after each battle.

MysteriousDice.name: ITEM_MYSTERIOUSDICE_NAME
MysteriousDice.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. Your team's level up options are complete chaos!

MysteriousDice_Fixed.name: ITEM_MYSTERIOUSDICE_FIXED_NAME
MysteriousDice_Fixed.desc_resolved: Use: Permanently upgrade one of your active abilities at random.

ExperimentalTreatment.name: ARMOR_EXPERIMENTALTREATMENT_NAME
ExperimentalTreatment.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. Your team's passive ability level ups offer disorders instead.

ExperimentalTreatment_Fixed.name: ARMOR_EXPERIMENTALTREATMENT_FIXED_NAME
ExperimentalTreatment_Fixed.desc_resolved: Your spells cost 1 less for each disorder you have.

UltraVision3000.name: ARMOR_ULTRAVISION3000_NAME
UltraVision3000.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. Events are harder. All normal events trigger 2 extra events.

NuclearKnife.name: ITEM_NUCLEARKNIFE_NAME
NuclearKnife.desc_resolved:
Side Quest Item. Use: Melee Attack with damage = charges ({aux}). Permanenetly gains 1 charge at the end of each turn.
If charges go above 10, this weapon explodes.
Loses half of its charges when it gets a kill.

NuclearKnife_Glowing.name: ITEM_NUCLEARKNIFE_GLOWING_NAME
NuclearKnife_Glowing.desc_resolved: Side Quest Item. It's about to explode! Get a kill with this now to quench it.

NuclearKnife_Fixed.name: ITEM_NUCLEARKNIFE_FIXED_NAME
NuclearKnife_Fixed.desc_resolved: Use: Deals 40 damage to a target and 20 damage to EVERYTHING ELSE. 20% chance to break on use.
